_comment: Mutation testing gate (Säule 2, the assert(true)-killer). Scope: every *.pure.ts module — pure, side-effect-free domain logic — mutated IN FULL. This operationalises the framework's 'pull risk logic out of the I/O' rule: pure logic is mutation-tested cheaply (no Testcontainers per mutant), while DB/HTTP/integration code is covered by integration tests + the trace gate, not by mutation (see vitest.mutation.config.ts for the exclusions). The convention scales: a new *.pure.ts module is picked up automatically, no line ranges to maintain.
_thresholds_comment: Baseline on the pure modules is 100% (the fast-check property tests kill the arithmetic mutants). break=100 makes this a strict ratchet: any surviving mutant fails CI.
